title: Manifest Entry Unit
description: Schema that describes a Checkbox Manifest Entry unit

id.description: Unique identifier of the manifest entry.

name.description: Human-readable name of the manifest entry.

value-type.description: Type of value for this entry.

value-units.description: Units in which the value is measured, only used when value-type is natural.

resource-key.description: Name of the resource key used to store the manifest value as a resource record.

prompt.description: Custom prompt presented when collecting values from a user.

hidden-reason.description: Explains why a manifest entry was hidden, required if the id starts with an underscore.
